title: Calendar Store Contract
description: Validates the _contract.json file for a Calendar store. A Calendar holds time-scheduled events with start/end times and optional recurrence.

event_schema.description: JSON Schema for an event. Must include start time. Should support end time, duration, recurrence.

recurrence_rules.description: Supported recurrence patterns (daily, weekly, monthly, custom RRULE).

conflict_policy.description: What happens when events overlap in time.
